backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend canister with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features that removed 'Ikku' text from the page title and IntroScreen component heading.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing component purposes, state management, styling, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color variables for light/dark themes defining romantic color palette and design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title '❤️ Ek Chhota Sa Quiz' and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/publish-domain.json: Publish configuration specifying deployment domain slug 'ikku-ek-chhota-sa-quiz' with validation requirements.
frontend/README.md: Documentation explaining the romantic quiz app, publish domain configuration in publish-domain.json, and domain validation requirements.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component managing state machine (locked → welcome → intro → q1-q3 → reveal) with session-persisted unlock, ambient hearts, and music toggle.
frontend/src/components/AmbientHearts.ts: Fixed-layer component continuously spawning animated floating hearts from bottom to top with performance caps and reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedStep.tsx: Wrapper component providing smooth fade/scale transitions between different app states with 300ms duration.
frontend/src/components/HeartBurst.tsx: Animated heart burst effect displaying 8 floating hearts with randomized positions and staggered delays.
frontend/src/components/IntroScreen.tsx: Intro screen displaying '❤️ Ek Chhota Sa Quiz' title, subtitle, decorative heart icon, and 'Shuru Karein' start button.
frontend/src/components/LockScreen.tsx: Password gate component validating 'angel' password with error feedback, shake animation on failure, and romantic styling.
frontend/src/components/MusicToggle.tsx: A fixed-position button component that toggles background music playback with volume control, loading states, error handling, and session persistence using useSessionState.
frontend/src/components/QuizScreen.tsx: Displays a single quiz question with multiple-choice answers, shows feedback with heart animations for correct answers, and auto-advances after 2.5 seconds for incorrect answers.
frontend/src/components/QuizShell.tsx: A reusable wrapper component that provides a styled card container with decorative sparkle icons for quiz screens.
frontend/src/components/RevealScreen.tsx: Displays a romantic Urdu shayari (poem) with heart decorations and a restart button after quiz completion.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeScreen.ts: The initial screen greeting "Angel" with a romantic message and a button to start the quiz.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an ICP backend actor with authentication, automatically invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and delegation validation for ICP integration.
frontend/src/hooks/usePrefersReducedMoti: Detects and returns the user's reduced motion preference from system settings for accessibility.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: An intentionally empty placeholder file indicating no backend data fetching is needed for this frontend-only quiz app.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionState.ts: A custom hook that syncs state with sessionStorage, providing persistent state across page reloads within the same session.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom romantic color palette (pinks, reds), dark mode support, cursive fonts, shadows, and animations for the quiz UI.
frontend/src/lib/quizData.ts: Defines the QuizQuestion interface and exports an array of three quiz questions in Hindi/Hinglish with options, correct answers, and feedback messages containing romantic themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers for state management and authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, typography, animations, and theme extensions including sidebar and chart colors.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking completed features (removal of 'Ikku' from page title and IntroScreen) and a pending request to remove 'ikku' name from a third page.
